goal: Daily AI paper digest: select and ingest one recent AI agents/evaluation/systems paper

steps.title: Select recent primary-source AI paper
steps.notes: Selected arXiv:2606.25447 because it was submitted on 2026-06-24 and directly tests harness design, post-training, tool-use, and OOD agent evaluation.

evidence.note: arXiv page shows submitted on 24 Jun 2026 and paper abstract/title.

evidence.ref: arXiv API query sorted by submittedDate for LLM agents, agent evaluation, tool use, memory, and coding agents
zuhn_brief selected harness/tool-interface rigor as relevant prior principle

steps.title: Check Zuhn for duplicate paper
steps.notes: No existing source or insight matched the title, arXiv ID, URL, or obvious title fragments before ingest.

evidence.ref: rg -n "The Interplay of Harness Design|2606\.25447|arxiv\.org/(abs|pdf|html)/2606\.25447|Harness Design and Post-Training|post-training.*LLM Agents" knowledge-base . -S --glob '!node_modules/**'

steps.title: Ingest source and extract insights
steps.notes: Initial PDF ingest was raw bytes and was removed; clean HTML source was ingested as SRC-260625-9A80 and 7 insights were extracted through scripts/extract.ts.

artifacts.description: Clean arXiv HTML source for The Interplay of Harness Design and Post-Training in LLM Agents
Auto post-ingest commit containing source, insights, derived indices, embeddings, and views

risk_assessments.action: Ingest source, add insights, run post-ingest, and commit derived KB state
risk_assessments.rationale: The run mutates the durable knowledge base and git history, so health and source/insight verification must pass before marking the run passed.

side_effects.action: Removed bad raw-PDF source artifact created earlier in this same run

evidence.ref: The PDF URL was detected as blog and stored raw PDF bytes; replacement HTML ingest created clean source SRC-260625-9A80.

verification_gates.name: Recent primary paper and duplicate check passed

evidence.ref: rg duplicate check returned no matches before ingest

evidence.note: Pipeline summary: health PASSED, reindex OK, embed OK, gate PASSED, learn OK, views OK, auto-git COMMITTED.

verification_gates.name: Final health and source count verified

evidence.note: Health check passed with 0 errors and 0 warnings.

evidence.ref: git log -1 --oneline --decorate => 2f5fe6ebe0 auto: post-ingest — 7 new insights, 1750 updated

final_status.summary: Selected arXiv:2606.25447, verified no duplicate, ingested clean HTML source SRC-260625-9A80, extracted 7 insights, and post-ingest committed successfully.
